Orange Square

Orange Square (Ju Zi Tang)

← Back to all restaurants
★★★★★ 4.3
📍 Santa Clara, California📅 2026
Taiwanese Bento Box Rice Bowl Street Food Bubble Tea
Orange Square is a local Bay Area favorite for anyone craving Taiwanese comfort food, specializing in bento boxes, rice bowls, and hand-shaken bubble tea. It’s got a super relaxed vibe with quick counter service and convenient takeout boxes—just look for their signature orange sesame toast logo! The Santa Clara spot is tucked away in a shopping center on Homestead Rd, where an open kitchen whips up everything fresh to order, bringing those authentic Taiwanese street-food flavors right to the West Coast. The menu centers on hearty rice bowls and bento (traditional multi-compartment meal boxes). Their Jiao Ma Chicken bento is a standout, featuring a crispy fried chicken cutlet loaded with scallions, chili, and cilantro, plus a lemon wedge for a citrusy kick. It comes packed with white rice, sautéed cabbage with wood ear mushrooms, corn, broccoli, and a spring roll. For something extra savory, the Braised Pork Belly and Sausage combo is a must-try, served with Taiwanese sausage and two Lu Dan (soy-braised eggs). They also serve up glazed Teriyaki Chicken and fresh, crispy Karaage bowls. Don’t sleep on the snacks either—the Golden Lava Taro Balls with their molten salted egg yolk center are incredible, as are the sweet potato fries with crispy fried basil and the Lu Wei (soy-marinated appetizer) platters. To drink, you can’t go wrong with their classic boba or a refreshing mango smoothie. Perfect for a quick Taiwanese comfort lunch, easy takeout, or a casual hang with friends.
Good for A quick Taiwanese comfort lunch Easy takeout Or a casual hang with friends

What I ordered

Thai-Style Spicy & Numbing Fried Chicken Bento (Jiao Ma Ji) Braised Pork Belly & Taiwanese Sausage Combo Donburi (Kong Rou & Xiang Chang) Teriyaki Chicken Thigh Donburi Japanese Fried Chicken (Karaage) Donburi Golden Sand Taro Balls (with Molten Salted Egg Yolk Center) Sweet Potato Fries with Crispy Thai Basil Taiwanese Braised Platter (Lu Wei) Pearl Milk Tea (Boba Milk Tea) Mango Fruit Smoothie
